artPrompt: A shapeless sludge horror drags itself from the bubbling reservoir, half-formed and shifting, its silhouette flickering toward something nameless and dreadful as sickly bioluminescent ooze sheets off its mass. Rusted pipes and crumbling towers loom under a bruised stormy sky behind. Ominous low film-still angle of an unknowable thing emerging at epic scale, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Whatever Crawled Out Next
text:
Whatever Crawled Out Next enters with X sludge counters on it. As it enters, name a creature type you're afraid of out loud; it's also that type now, and so are you, emotionally.
It gets +1/+1 for each sludge counter on it.
Feed (Whenever a player rolls one or more dice, flips one or more coins, or votes, put a sludge counter on this creature.)
Whenever it attacks, each opponent describes how they'd run. They get no benefit. You just like hearing it.
flavorText: There is always a next one. The reservoir is deep and the town keeps providing.
